title: Christmas Companions Lokta Paper
description: A reusable handmade lokta paper that celebrates our furry companions at Christmas. At 35x35cm, its the perfect wrapping paper to gift a bath bomb or 100g Lush bottle!

images.alt: Christmas Companions. A square sheet of Lokta wrapping paper. It features a pink, scalloped border, red background and illustrations of colourful dogs, cats, rabbits and birds with snowflakes, Santa hats and fairy lights.

A small, round gift wrapped in a colorful, patterned "Christmas Companions" lokta paper with reindeers and other festive characters. It's tied with pink string and sitting on a light purple, ribbon-wrapped box.
A close-up of "Christmas Companions" lokta paper with a festive pattern of whimsical cats in various colors, flying birds, and small snowflakes on a red-and-pink background.

Christmas Companions. A square sheet of Lokta wrapping paper. It features a pink, scalloped border, red background and illustrations of colourful dogs, cats, rabbits and birds with snowflakes, Santa hats and fairy lights.
